journey.name: Admin — auth guard 401 checks
journey.description: Verifies that every protected endpoint called by the Terminal app returns 401 Unauthorized when no Bearer token is supplied. Covers all four APIs used by the Terminal: Admin, Loyalty, Operations, and Retail. The public POST /api/v1/auth/login endpoint is intentionally excluded. No step chains to another — each step is a standalone 401 assertion.

steps.name: GET /admin/users — no token
steps.description: List all employee users without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. Auth middleware rejects before the handler executes.
expected.validationNotes: No user data must be returned. No downstream User MS call should be made.

steps.name: GET /admin/users/{userId} — no token
steps.description: Fetch a single employee user without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. A 404 would indicate auth was bypassed.
expected.validationNotes: Response must be 401, not 404. Auth guard fires before the userId lookup.

steps.name: POST /admin/users — no token
steps.description: Create an employee user without an Authorization header. A valid body is provided so a 400 cannot mask a missing 401.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No user account must be created.
expected.validationNotes: No downstream User MS call should be made.

steps.name: PATCH /admin/users/{userId} — no token
steps.description: Update user profile fields without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No profile fields must be mutated.

steps.name: PATCH /admin/users/{userId}/status — no token
steps.description: Change a user's active/inactive status without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. Account status must not change.

steps.name: POST /admin/users/{userId}/unlock — no token
steps.description: Unlock a locked user account without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No lockout state must change.

steps.name: POST /admin/users/{userId}/reset-password — no token
steps.description: Reset a user's password without an Authorization header. A valid new password is supplied so a 400 cannot mask a missing 401.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No password hash must be mutated.

steps.name: DELETE /admin/users/{userId} — no token
steps.description: Delete a user account without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No user record must be deleted. A 404 would indicate auth was bypassed.

steps.name: POST /admin/customers/search — no token
steps.description: Search loyalty customers via the Loyalty API without an Authorization header. A valid search body is supplied.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No customer data must be returned.
expected.validationNotes: No downstream Customer MS call should be made.

steps.name: GET /admin/customers/{loyaltyNumber} — no token
steps.description: Fetch a loyalty customer by loyalty number via the Loyalty API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. A 404 would indicate auth was bypassed.

steps.name: PATCH /admin/customers/{loyaltyNumber} — no token
steps.description: Update loyalty customer profile fields via the Loyalty API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No customer profile fields must be mutated.

steps.name: GET /admin/customers/{loyaltyNumber}/transactions — no token
steps.description: Fetch loyalty point transactions for a customer via the Loyalty API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No transaction data must be returned.

steps.name: POST /admin/customers/{loyaltyNumber}/points — no token
steps.description: Add loyalty points to a customer account via the Loyalty API without an Authorization header. A valid body is provided.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No points must be credited.
expected.validationNotes: No points transaction must be created.

steps.name: DELETE /admin/customers/{loyaltyNumber} — no token
steps.description: Delete a loyalty customer via the Loyalty API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No customer record must be deleted.

steps.name: PATCH /admin/customers/{loyaltyNumber}/status — no token
steps.description: Set a loyalty customer account status via the Loyalty API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. Account status must not change.

steps.name: PATCH /admin/customers/{loyaltyNumber}/identity — no token
steps.description: Update loyalty customer identity fields via the Loyalty API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No identity fields must be mutated.

steps.name: POST /admin/customers/{loyaltyNumber}/identity/set-password — no token
steps.description: Set a loyalty customer's identity password via the Loyalty API without an Authorization header. A valid password is provided so a 400 cannot mask a missing 401.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No password must be changed.

steps.name: POST /admin/customers/{loyaltyNumber}/identity/verify-email — no token
steps.description: Force-verify a loyalty customer's email via the Loyalty API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. Email verification state must not change.

steps.name: GET /admin/customers/{loyaltyNumber}/orders — no token
steps.description: Fetch orders associated with a loyalty customer via the Loyalty API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No order data must be returned.

steps.name: POST /admin/fare-rules/search — no token
steps.description: Search fare rules via the Operations API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No fare rule data must be returned.
expected.validationNotes: No downstream Schedule MS call should be made.

steps.name: GET /admin/fare-rules/{fareRuleId} — no token
steps.description: Fetch a fare rule by ID via the Operations API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. A 404 would indicate auth was bypassed.

steps.name: POST /admin/fare-rules — no token
steps.description: Create a fare rule via the Operations API without an Authorization header. A minimal valid body is provided so a 400 cannot mask a missing 401.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No fare rule must be created.
expected.validationNotes: No downstream call should be made.

steps.name: PUT /admin/fare-rules/{fareRuleId} — no token
steps.description: Replace a fare rule via the Operations API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No fare rule must be mutated.

steps.name: DELETE /admin/fare-rules/{fareRuleId} — no token
steps.description: Delete a fare rule via the Operations API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No fare rule must be deleted.

steps.name: GET /schedule-groups — no token
steps.description: List schedule groups via the Operations API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No schedule group data must be returned.
expected.validationNotes: No downstream Schedule MS call should be made.

steps.name: POST /schedule-groups — no token
steps.description: Create a schedule group via the Operations API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No schedule group must be created.
expected.validationNotes: No downstream call should be made.

steps.name: PUT /schedule-groups/{scheduleGroupId} — no token
steps.description: Update a schedule group via the Operations API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No schedule group must be mutated.

steps.name: DELETE /schedule-groups/{scheduleGroupId} — no token
steps.description: Delete a schedule group via the Operations API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No schedule group must be deleted.

steps.name: GET /schedules — no token
steps.description: List schedules via the Operations API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No schedule data must be returned.
expected.validationNotes: No downstream Schedule MS call should be made.

steps.name: POST /schedules/import-inventory — no token
steps.description: Trigger a schedule-to-inventory import via the Operations API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No inventory must be created or modified.
expected.validationNotes: No downstream Offer MS or Schedule MS call should be made.

steps.name: GET /admin/inventory — no token
steps.description: Fetch flight inventory via the Retail API without an Authorization header.

apiCall.note: Terminal app passes a departureDate query parameter at runtime

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No inventory data must be returned.
expected.validationNotes: No downstream Offer MS call should be made.

steps.name: GET /admin/inventory/{inventoryId}/holds — no token
steps.description: Fetch seat holds for an inventory record via the Retail API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. A 404 would indicate auth was bypassed.

steps.name: GET /admin/orders — no token
steps.description: Fetch recent orders via the Retail API without an Authorization header.

apiCall.note: Terminal app passes a limit query parameter at runtime

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No order data must be returned.
expected.validationNotes: No downstream Order MS call should be made.

steps.name: GET /admin/orders/{bookingReference} — no token
steps.description: Fetch a specific order by booking reference via the Retail API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. A 404 would indicate auth was bypassed.

steps.name: PATCH /orders/{bookingReference}/passengers — no token
steps.description: Update passenger details on an order via the Retail API without an Authorization header. A valid body is provided so a 400 cannot mask a missing 401.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No passenger records must be mutated.

steps.name: GET /ssr/options — no token
steps.description: Fetch available SSR options via the Retail API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No SSR option data must be returned.
expected.validationNotes: If this endpoint is intentionally public, it should be removed from this suite and documented as unauthenticated.

steps.name: PATCH /orders/{bookingReference}/ssrs — no token
steps.description: Update SSRs on an order via the Retail API without an Authorization header. A valid body is provided so a 400 cannot mask a missing 401.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No SSR records must be mutated.

steps.name: GET /admin/orders/{bookingReference}/tickets — no token
steps.description: Fetch e-tickets for an order via the Retail API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. No ticket data must be returned.

steps.name: GET /admin/orders/{bookingReference}/debug — no token
steps.description: Fetch debug information for an order via the Retail API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. Debug endpoints must be at least as well protected as their production equivalents.
expected.validationNotes: Response must be 401, not 404. Debug endpoints exposing internal state are high-risk if unauthenticated.

steps.name: GET /admin/orders/{bookingReference}/debug/tickets — no token
steps.description: Fetch debug ticket data for an order via the Retail API without an Authorization header.

expected.description: 401 Unauthorized — no Bearer token. Debug endpoints must be at least as well protected as their production equivalents.
expected.validationNotes: Response must be 401, not 404. Debug endpoints are high-risk if unauthenticated.
